title: Equilens — Algorithmic Compliance
lead: Equilens builds regulatory infrastructure for algorithmic decision-making. FL-BSA, our self-hosted fair-lending bias-simulation appliance, helps regulated teams simulate lending models, review disparity outcomes, and generate regulator-oriented evidence packs1 without moving customer data outside their environment.
